description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton that has ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and distressed look graphic lettering on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryGet a fresh dose of attitude with this green T-shirt from probase. The distressed look graphic lettering on the front is dripping with contempt towards people who put you down. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool edgy look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
